title: Graceful Native Module Fallback System
essence: Swiss Ephemeris probe with fallback calculation and deployment compatibility checks
steps: Implement Swiss Ephemeris availability probe on startup
Add fallback calculation methods when native module unavailable
Provide clear error messages for missing dependencies
Monitor platform compatibility and report issues
Implement graceful degradation for astrology features
rollback: Require native module for all astrology operations
Fail fast when Swiss Ephemeris unavailable

evidence.notes: Enables deployment on platforms without native module support while maintaining core functionality
